title: Resolution Recommending to the Local Chief Executive to Give Priority to All Non-recipients of the DSWD Social Amelioration Program on the Lgu?s Relief Operations As Part of the Program Against Covid-19. (AUTHOR(S) Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 04/30/2020)
